mapper.sql: (SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(parent_id, ''), user_id) FROM com_user WHERE user_id = #{userId})
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, POS_X, POS_Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT, FILL_COLOR, FILL_OPACITY, STROKE_COLOR, STROKE_OPACITY, STROKE_WIDTH, CORNER_RADIUS, FONT_SIZE, FONT_WEIGHT, TEXT_ANCHOR,
TEXT_AREA_CONTENT,
TEXT_CONTENT,
RX, RY, SORT_IDX, DRAW_CONF ) VALUES ( , #{grpNo}, #{devKind1}, #{devKind2},
#{posX}, 300,
#{posY}, 300,
#{width}, #{height}, #{fillColor}, #{fillOpacity}, #{strokeColor}, #{strokeOpacity}, #{strokeWidth}, #{cornerRadius}, 26, 'bold', 'middle',
'Text Area Contents',
'Text',
#{rx}, #{ry}, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SORT_IDX), 0) + 1 FROM CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL CTDT WHERE GRP_NO = #{grpNo} AND USER_ID = ), #{drawConf} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL SET POS_X = #{posX}, POS_Y = #{posY}, WIDTH = #{width}, HEIGHT = #{height}, FILL_COLOR = #{fillColor}, FILL_OPACITY = #{fillOpacity}, STROKE_COLOR = #{strokeColor}, STROKE_OPACITY = #{strokeOpacity}, STROKE_WIDTH = #{strokeWidth}, CORNER_RADIUS = #{cornerRadius}, FONT_SIZE = #{fontSize}, FONT_WEIGHT = #{fontWeight}, TEXT_ANCHOR = #{textAnchor},
TEXT_AREA_CONTENT = #{textContent},
TEXT_CONTENT = #{textContent},
RX = #{rx}, RY = #{ry}, SORT_IDX = #{sortIdx}, FONT_DISTANCE = #{fontDistance}, ROTATION = #{rotation}, LINE_STYLE = #{lineStyle}, DRAW_CONF = #{drawConf} WHERE DRAW_NO = #{drawNo}

insert.foreach: INSERT INTO CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL ( USER_ID, GRP_NO, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, POS_X, POS_Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT, FILL_COLOR, FILL_OPACITY, STROKE_COLOR, STROKE_OPACITY, STROKE_WIDTH, CORNER_RADIUS, FONT_SIZE, FONT_WEIGHT, TEXT_ANCHOR, TEXT_CONTENT, RX, RY, SORT_IDX, TEXT_AREA_CONTENT, FONT_DISTANCE, ROTATION, LINE_STYLE, DRAW_CONF ) SELECT USER_ID, #{grpNo}, DEV_KIND1, DEV_KIND2, CASE WHEN CAST(#{grpNo} AS BIGINT) = CAST(#{orgGrpNo} AS BIGINT) THEN CASE WHEN POS_X >= CAST(#{width} AS DOUBLE PRECISION) THEN POS_X - (20 * (CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT) + 1)) ELSE POS_X + (20 * (CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT) + 1)) END ELSE CASE WHEN POS_X >= CAST(#{width} AS DOUBLE PRECISION) THEN POS_X - (20 * CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT)) ELSE POS_X + (20 * CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT)) END END AS POS_X, CASE WHEN CAST(#{grpNo} AS BIGINT) = CAST(#{orgGrpNo} AS BIGINT) THEN CASE WHEN POS_Y >= CAST(#{height} AS DOUBLE PRECISION) THEN POS_Y - (20 * (CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT) + 1)) ELSE POS_Y + (20 * (CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT) + 1)) END ELSE CASE WHEN POS_Y >= CAST(#{height} AS DOUBLE PRECISION) THEN POS_Y - (20 * CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT)) ELSE POS_Y + (20 * CAST(#{idxCnt} AS INT)) END END AS POS_Y, WIDTH, HEIGHT, FILL_COLOR, FILL_OPACITY, STROKE_COLOR, STROKE_OPACITY, STROKE_WIDTH, CORNER_RADIUS, FONT_SIZE, FONT_WEIGHT, TEXT_ANCHOR, TEXT_CONTENT, RX, RY, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(SORT_IDX), 0) + 1 FROM CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL CTDT WHERE GRP_NO = #{grpNo} AND USER_ID = ), TEXT_AREA_CONTENT, FONT_DISTANCE, ROTATION, LINE_STYLE, DRAW_CONF FROM CM_TOPO_DRAW_TOOL A WHERE DRAW_NO = #{item.drawNo} AND USER_ID =

mapper.select:
SELECT SPLINE_NO, USER_ID, GRP_NO, SPLINE_TYPE, SPLINE_STRING, SPLINE_CONF, SPLINE_SIZE, SPLINE_STYLE, SPLINE_COLOR, 'spline' AS ITEM_TYPE FROM CM_TOPO_SPLINE WHERE USER_ID = AND GRP_NO = #{grpNo}
AND SPLINE_NO = #{splineNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_TOPO_SPLINE SET SPLINE_TYPE = #{splineType}, SPLINE_STRING = #{splineString}, SPLINE_CONF = #{splineConf}, SPLINE_SIZE = #{splineSize}, SPLINE_STYLE = #{splineStyle}, SPLINE_COLOR = #{splineColor} WHERE SPLINE_NO = #{splineNo}
